title: NetToolsKit Operational Memory Layering Catalog

layers.title: Concise entrypoint memory
layers.intent: Always-loadable curated memory for stable operator context.
editorialRules: Keep only durable operational facts and high-value recall anchors.
Do not duplicate active planning tasks or verbose execution transcripts.

layers.title: Topic memory files
layers.intent: Curated topic-specific detail that expands the entrypoint without bloating it.
editorialRules: Create one file per stable topic or subsystem.
Promote distilled notes from operational logs only after review.

layers.title: Append-only operational notes
layers.intent: Temporary operational capture for later distillation into curated memory.
editorialRules: Use for transient observations, raw findings, and note capture.
Do not treat operational notes as the always-loaded memory source.

directoryModel.editorialBoundary: Memory files are curated operator assets. Planning stays under planning/ and is never the primary memory store.
directoryModel.indexingBoundary: Local-context and SQLite recall may index memory files, but they do not own their editorial lifecycle.

distillationFlow: Capture raw observations in operational notes.
Review and condense recurring or durable facts.
Promote distilled facts into topic memory files.
Promote only the smallest stable anchors into the concise entrypoint.

retrievalAlignment.ragRole: RAG may retrieve layered memory files as evidence.
retrievalAlignment.cagRole: CAG may compact layered memory into bounded prompt context.
guardrails: Do not flood always-loaded context with raw operational notes.
Do not repurpose planning artifacts as memory files.
Keep entrypoint memory concise enough for deterministic inclusion.
